Title: SIM-001 Canonical Simulation Spec
Body: Freeze state schema, tick order, invariants, and failure semantics. Acceptance: approved SIM_SPEC.md; invariants testable; schema evolution protocol documented.

Title: SIM-002 Typed Domain Models + Migration Framework
Body: Implement versioned schemas for entities and forward-only migrations with rollback strategy. Acceptance: machine-readable validation and migration tests.

Title: SIM-003 Deterministic Tick Runtime
Body: Build runTick(world, seed) with subsystem RNG partitioning. Acceptance: byte-identical replay over 10k ticks for same seed/input.

Title: SIM-004 Snapshot + Event Log Persistence
Body: Event-sourced delta log plus periodic snapshots. Acceptance: replay from genesis and checkpoints; crash-safe write guarantees.

Title: SIM-005 Invariant and Property-Based Test Rig
Body: Create seed fuzzing harness and invariant checks. Acceptance: 1000+ seeds nightly with reproducible counterexample seeds.

Title: SIM-006 World Generator v1
Body: Generate clustered frontier settlements with configurable density/stress profiles. Acceptance: no isolated dead regions, reproducible seeds.

Title: SIM-007 Pressure System Core
Body: Implement coupled state updates for population, food, goods, security, extraction burden, trade health, border strain. Acceptance: bounded stable dynamics.

Title: SIM-008 Hazard Engine
Body: Probability-field event selection from pressures, context, cooldowns. Acceptance: no scripted inevitabilities; distribution tests pass.

Title: SIM-009 Event Pack v1 (20 Macro Events)
Body: Define nonviolent and destabilizing macro events with trigger profiles and consequence maps. Acceptance: each event tested/logged.

Title: SIM-010 Institution Policy Engines
Body: Implement military, market, council, press, clergy, judicial policy outputs with bounded rationality. Acceptance: explainable action traces.

Title: SIM-011 Trade Network Formation and Route Strain
Body: Endogenous route creation and disruption under stress/conflict. Acceptance: topology metrics and plausible corridor shifts.

Title: SIM-012 Expansion Decay Reversion Loop
Body: Frontier growth near active clusters; collapse and recolonization mechanisms. Acceptance: no long-run map lock-in.

Title: SIM-013 Truth Layer Separation
Body: Model ground truth and reported truth as separate first-class objects with provenance.

Title: SIM-014 Distortion Model (Bias Latency Suppression)
Body: Source-specific distortion, suppression, and lag behavior. Acceptance: measurable false positive/negative and tunable profiles.

Title: SIM-015 Belief Propagation Graph
Body: Trust-weighted narrative propagation with decay/saturation. Acceptance: coexistence of conflicting narratives by subgroup.

Title: SIM-016 Legitimacy as Emergent Derived State
Body: Compute legitimacy from belief topology and institutional credibility; remove direct writes.

Title: SIM-017 Chronicle and Media Surface Generator
Body: Generate timeline entries, headlines, rumors tied to causal event IDs.

Title: SIM-018 Chronicle Store + Query API
Body: Index and query chronicle by time/region/faction/institution/event type.

Title: SIM-019 Operator Console v1
Body: Build map inspector, institution panel, timeline and run controls with causal trace UI.

Title: SIM-020 Experiment Runner and Sensitivity Harness
Body: Batch seed runner and parameter sweep exports with drift alerts.

Title: SIM-021 Telemetry Alerts and Runtime Diagnostics
Body: Metrics and alerts for freeze risk, event starvation, runaway dominance, report divergence.

Title: SIM-022 Tuning Service (Versioned Parameters)
Body: Versioned runtime-tunable parameter sets with safe rollout/rollback and provenance.

Title: SIM-023 Performance and Scale Optimization
Body: Optimize runtime and memory to target 100k settlements in batch simulation.

Title: SIM-024 Fault Tolerance and Recovery
Body: Checkpoint restore and recovery drills; bounded RPO/RTO guarantees.

Title: SIM-025 Governance Failure Mode Test Suite
Body: Explicit scenario tests for lock-in, immortal empires, irreversible decay, misinformation capture.

Title: SIM-026 Security and Access Controls
Body: RBAC and audit logging for operator and tuning surfaces.

Title: SIM-027 Validation Protocol (Scientific)
Body: Hypotheses, falsification tests, calibration boundaries, and limitation statements for release gating.

Title: SIM-028 Release Hardening and Operational Docs
Body: Architecture docs, runbooks, incident playbook, release checklist, rollback drill.
